wins: AI revenue quadrupled year-on-year to $2.3 billion
Software bookings to grow to over $3 billion in Q2
Reiterated full year guidance for software revenue of $20 billion
Reiterated full year guidance for consolidated revenue of $50 billion
Reiterated full year adjusted EBITDA guidance of 60%
risks: Server storage revenue to decline mid-20% year-on-year
Wireless revenue to be flat year-on-year
VMware's contribution to revenue is a key factor
Market conditions for telco spending remain weak
